title: Győr、Győr-Moson-Sopron — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Győr、Győr-Moson-Sopronの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

GyőrはGyőr-Moson-Sopronにある人口133,946の都市です。A prosperous city in northwestern Hungary, home to the Audi manufacturing plant, a beautifully restored Baroque old town, and a strategic location near Vienna and Bratislava.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
